core_mechanism: importance-sampling random walk over a deliberately broadened (flattened) auxiliary distribution that lets the Markov chain cross barriers between metastable states, combined with histogram reweighting to recover expectation values under any target distribution from that single biased run
brief_reason: The abstract replaces sharply-peaked canonical sampling with a random walk in energy space that overcomes quasi-ergodic trapping and then uses single-/multiple-histogram reweighting to obtain canonical averages at any temperature from one run, which is exactly a flattened-distribution importance-sampling-plus-reweighting scheme.
